title: Fractum - extra blocks
description: add a bunch of new block sets based on vanilla materials, aim to improve the building experience
body:
# Description
Extra Blocks is a Fractum mod with the purpose of adding new blocks. 
Aims to enhance the building possibilities using vanilla materials and item to create new interesting texture patterns and palettes. 

> ###   [My links](https://bento.me/gloxinia)
> ###   [Official wiki](https://online.fliphtml5.com/gloxinia_04/yztv/)

# Content
### Brick set 
> 16 variants (one for color)

### Infused sets
> quartz + gold 

> deepslate + amethyst

> tuff + azure prismarine

> tuff + green prismarine

### New stone sets
> brownstone (can be found in desert biomes)

### Vanilla adds
> amethyst crystal block

> prismarine crystal block

> railed glass

> framed glass
